title: Settings
subtitle: Default browser, autostart, appearance, and config IO.

defaultBrowser.isDefault: LinkPilot is the system default browser
defaultBrowser.isNotDefault: LinkPilot is not the default browser
defaultBrowser.summary: All URLs route through LinkPilot's rules engine.
defaultBrowser.hint: macOS will prompt to confirm. On Windows you'll be sent to Settings → Default apps.
defaultBrowser.successDefault: Set successfully. macOS may show a confirmation dialog.
defaultBrowser.successOther: Please finish the default-browser switch in System Settings.
defaultBrowser.successOtherWithUrl: Open {{url}} to finish setting LinkPilot as default.
defaultBrowser.unsupported: This platform doesn't expose a programmatic 'set default'.

defaultTarget.label: Default target
defaultTarget.description: Where to open links when no rule matches. Changing this rewrites the config file.

appearance.languageDescription: Display language for the LinkPilot UI. The picker window picks this up the next time it opens.
appearance.pickerStyleDescription: The wheel that appears for Ask rules. Hold ⌥ over a multi-profile browser in the picker to summon it. Click a preview below to switch — the change applies the next time the picker opens.
appearance.profileOrderDescription: Customize which profiles appear in the Halo wheel and the order they occupy. Position 1–9 maps to keyboard shortcuts.

daemon.descLoaded: LaunchAgent loads at every login. GUI runs in "{{mode}}" mode.
daemon.descInstall: Install the LaunchAgent so the router keeps working when LinkPilot.app is closed.
daemon.descDev: No bundled daemon found — you're on a dev build. Releases ship the daemon embedded in the .app.
daemon.successInstalled: Background service installed. The daemon will start now and on every login.
daemon.successUninstalled: Background service removed. The daemon won't auto-start anymore.

cli.label: lpt CLI
cli.descBundled: The bundled binary lives inside this .app. Installing creates a symlink at ~/.local/bin/lpt so `lpt` works from any shell.
cli.descDev: No bundled `lpt` found — you're on a dev build. Releases ship the CLI embedded in the .app.
cli.successInstalled: Installed: {{path}}. Add ~/.local/bin to your PATH if it isn't already.

updateState.idle: No update check has run in this session.
updateState.downloaded: Version {{version}} is downloaded. Click Open installer to upgrade.
updateState.upToDate: LinkPilot is up to date at {{version}}.
updateState.errorWithVersion: Version {{version}} is available, but the installer download failed: {{error}}
